name: qa-workflow
description: End-to-end QA testing workflow plugin: analyze requirements → create test cases → prepare test data → review quality → execute tests → generate reports

commands.name: qa-workflow init
commands.description: Initialize new QA project and configure Jira integration (optional)

commands.name: qa-workflow analyze
commands.description: Analyze requirements and identify test scenarios

commands.name: qa-workflow modify-tests
commands.description: Modify and update existing test cases

commands.name: qa-workflow review
commands.description: Quality review of test cases (QA Lead gate)
